segments.en: Arm yourself with specific knowledge, accountability, leverage, and judgment. Specific knowledge is knowledge that you cannot be trained for. If society can train you, it can train someone else and replace you.
segments.cn: 用特定知识、责任感、杠杆和判断力武装自己。特定知识是你无法被培训的知识。如果社会可以培训你，它也可以培训其他人来取代你。

segments.en: Specific knowledge is found by pursuing your genuine curiosity and passion rather than whatever is hot right now. Building specific knowledge will feel like play to you but will look like work to others.
segments.cn: 特定知识是通过追求你真正的好奇心和热情而被发现的，而不是追随当下热门的东西。建立特定知识对你来说会感觉像玩耍，但在别人看来像工作。

segments.en: When you do things for their own sake, you create your best work. If you do it for money, you create the worst work. Specific knowledge is found by pursuing your genuine curiosity and passion rather than whatever is hot right now.
segments.cn: 当你为事情本身而做时，你会创造出最好的作品。如果你为了钱而做，你会创造出最糟糕的作品。特定知识是通过追求你真正的好奇心和热情而被发现的，而不是追随当下热门的东西。

segments.en: Specific knowledge is often highly technical or creative. It cannot be outsourced or automated. Embrace accountability and take business risks under your own name. Society will reward you with responsibility, equity, and leverage.
segments.cn: 特定知识通常是高度技术性或创造性的。它不能被外包或自动化。拥抱责任感，以你自己的名义承担商业风险。社会将以责任、股权和杠杆回报你。

segments.en: The most accountable people have singular, public, and risky brands: Oprah, Trump, Kanye, Elon. The most important skill for getting rich is becoming a perpetual learner. You have to know how to learn anything you want to learn.
segments.cn: 最有责任感的人拥有独特的、公开的和有风险的 brand：Oprah、Trump、Kanye、Elon。致富最重要的技能是成为一个终身学习者。你必须知道如何学习任何你想学习的东西。

segments.en: The old model of making money is going to school for four years, getting a degree, and working as an employee for 30 years. That model is gone.
segments.cn: 旧的赚钱模式是上学四年，获得学位，然后作为员工工作30年。那个模式已经消失了。
